_purpose: Anti-Generic Design System V3: SPECIFIC CSS/Tailwind values that make AI output look human-designed. Every value differs from LLM defaults. The AI should copy these directly. Updated from 3 iterations of expert visual critique.

font_system._why: Font is the #1 tell of AI-generated UI. LLMs default to font-sans with no OpenType features.
font_system.root_css: * { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-feature-settings: 'cv02' 1, 'cv03' 1, 'cv11' 1; } body { -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }

tailwind_classes.hero_kpi_value: text-[2.75rem] font-semibold tracking-[-0.04em] text-zinc-50 leading-[1] tabular-nums

anti_defaults: NEVER use text-base (16px) in a dashboard. Use text-[11.5px] for table cells, text-[12.5px] for nav.
NEVER use default Tailwind tracking. Hero KPIs: tracking-[-0.04em]. Secondary KPIs: tracking-[-0.02em]. Table headers: tracking-[0.08em].
ALWAYS add tabular-nums to any number. Add 't' utility class from root CSS.
Table headers are 9.5px uppercase with 0.08em tracking. Table cells are 11.5px. These sizes DIFFER.
Dates and secondary data columns use text-[10.5px] text-zinc-700 — nearly invisible but present.

spacing_system._why: AI-generated UIs have varying, arbitrary spacing. Human-designed UIs lock to a single vertical rhythm.

vertical_rhythm._critical: ALL vertical gaps between major sections use mt-5 (20px). This is the LOCKED rhythm token. Do not vary it.
vertical_rhythm.within_card: Uses smaller tokens: mt-1, mt-1.5, mt-2, mt-2.5 — but sections are ALWAYS mt-5.
vertical_rhythm.larger_break: mb-8 ONLY between conceptual groups (KPI zone → content zone). Never between sibling cards.

card_level.chart_card: no outer padding — header uses px-5 pt-4, chart area uses px-5, footer uses mx-5
card_level.table_card: p-0 overflow-hidden, header area uses px-5 h-10

anti_defaults: ALL section gaps are mt-5 (20px). Not mt-4, not mt-6. LOCKED rhythm.
Card grid gap is gap-3 (12px), NOT gap-4 or gap-5. Tighter = more intentional.
Table row padding is py-[9px], NOT py-3 or py-4. Non-standard = non-mechanical.
Sidebar is w-[220px], NOT w-64 (256px) or w-[240px]. Narrower sidebar = more content room.
Sidebar items use py-[5px], NOT py-2 (8px). Header uses h-12, not py-4.
Chart card has NO uniform padding. Header, chart area, and footer each have independent padding.

elevation_system._why: AI uses one surface color for all cards. Human designers use 2-3 elevation tiers to create depth without shadows.
rules: Hero KPI card uses bg-[#101012] border-[#1a1a1e] — strongest elevation.
Secondary stat cards use bg-[#0e0e10] border-[#16161a] — one step lower.
Chart and table cards use bg-[#101012] border-[#1a1a1e] — same as hero for content.
Table header row uses bg-[#0c0c0e] — sunken into card.
Sidebar uses base bg-[#0a0a0c] — same as page background, not elevated.
Borders use SPECIFIC hex values, NOT rgba(). Three tiers: #1a1a1e / #16161a / #131315.
Hover uses white/[0.012] — barely perceptible. Not white/[0.02] or white/[0.04].

color_overrides._why: LLMs default to saturated greens, reds, and purples. Human designers use muted, opacity-reduced variants.

delta_colors._why: V3 learning: use /80 and /60 opacity, not /70. And reduce red further than green — red draws more attention naturally.

anti_defaults: Delta red uses /60 opacity, NOT /70 or full. Red at /60 stops screaming.
Status dots are 5px (w-[5px] h-[5px]), NOT w-1.5 (6px). Smaller = subtler.
Warning color is amber-400/60, NOT yellow-500. Amber is warmer than yellow.
Chart grid lines are rgba(255,255,255,0.025) — NOT 0.04 or 0.06. Nearly invisible.

component_code._why: V3-verified Tailwind class strings. These exact values produced output that passed expert design critique.

hero_kpi_dark._note: FULL-WIDTH hero KPI. This is the most important number on the page. It gets its own card, full width, largest text.
hero_kpi_dark.wrapper: rounded-lg border border-[#1a1a1e] bg-[#101012] px-6 pt-5 pb-4
hero_kpi_dark.label: text-[10.5px] font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.06em] text-zinc-600
hero_kpi_dark.value: mt-1.5 text-[2.75rem] font-semibold tracking-[-0.04em] text-zinc-50 leading-[1] tabular-nums
hero_kpi_dark.sparkline_area: mt-2 (right side of flex, 120x44px SVG sparkline, stroke #d4d4d8 opacity 0.25, area fill gradient to transparent)

secondary_kpi_dark._note: Compact stat cards below hero. 3 in a row. Value and delta on same line using flex justify-between.
secondary_kpi_dark.wrapper: rounded-md border border-[#16161a] bg-[#0e0e10] px-4 py-3 flex items-baseline justify-between
secondary_kpi_dark.label: text-[10px] text-zinc-600

sidebar_dark.container: fixed left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-[220px] border-r border-[#1a1a1e] bg-[#0a0a0c] flex flex-col z-10
sidebar_dark.logo_icon: w-[22px] h-[22px] rounded-[5px] flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] font-bold text-white leading-none
sidebar_dark.nav_section: flex-1 px-2 pt-1 flex flex-col gap-[1px]
sidebar_dark.nav_item: flex items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-[5px] rounded-[5px] text-[12.5px] font-medium text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-300 hover:bg-white/[0.03] transition-colors duration-150
sidebar_dark.nav_item_active: flex items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-[5px] rounded-[5px] text-[12.5px] font-medium text-zinc-200 bg-white/[0.06]
sidebar_dark.section_label: px-2.5 mt-5 mb-1 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-zinc-700
sidebar_dark.user_item: flex items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-[5px] rounded-[5px] hover:bg-white/[0.03] transition-colors duration-150 cursor-pointer
sidebar_dark.user_avatar: w-[22px] h-[22px] rounded-full bg-zinc-800 flex items-center justify-center text-[9px] font-medium text-zinc-400

table_dark._note: V3 table has real typographic hierarchy: CLIENT is the only bold column, AMOUNT is the only semibold, REF/TYPE/DATE are dimmed.
table_dark.th: px-4 py-2 text-left text-[9.5px] font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-zinc-700
table_dark.th_right: px-4 py-2 text-right text-[9.5px] font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-zinc-700
table_dark.cell_amount_positive: px-4 py-[9px] text-[11.5px] font-semibold text-right tabular-nums text-emerald-400/80
table_dark.cell_amount_negative: px-4 py-[9px] text-[11.5px] font-semibold text-right tabular-nums text-red-400/60
table_dark.cell_date: pr-5 pl-4 py-[9px] text-[10.5px] text-zinc-700 text-right tabular-nums whitespace-nowrap
table_dark.pagination: px-5 py-2 flex items-center justify-between text-[10px] text-zinc-700 border-t border-[#16161a] tabular-nums

chart_dark._note: V3: chart is full-width, stats are DOCKED as footer row inside the card — not orphaned outside.
chart_dark.header: flex items-center justify-between px-5 pt-4 pb-0
chart_dark.title: text-[12px] font-medium text-zinc-400
chart_dark.y_axis: absolute left-0 top-3 bottom-0 w-[42px] flex flex-col justify-between py-1 pr-2 text-right text-[9px] text-zinc-700 tabular-nums
chart_dark.x_axis: ml-[42px] flex justify-between px-5 pt-1 text-[9px] text-zinc-700 tabular-nums
chart_dark.grid_line: stroke rgba(255,255,255,0.025) — no stroke-dasharray for cleaner look, OR stroke-dasharray='3 3' for subtle dash
chart_dark.end_dot: circle r=2.5 fill=#b4b4ba at the end of primary line
chart_dark.area_gradient: linearGradient from rgba(180,180,186,0.05) at top to rgba(180,180,186,0) at 80%
chart_dark.footer: mx-5 mt-3 mb-4 pt-3 border-t border-[#16161a] flex items-center

header_dark.wrapper: flex items-center justify-between px-6 h-12 border-b border-[#1a1a1e]
header_dark.tab_group: flex items-center rounded-[5px] border border-[#1e1e22] overflow-hidden
header_dark.tab: w-8 h-[26px] text-[10.5px] font-medium text-zinc-600 hover:text-zinc-400 transition-colors text-center
header_dark.tab_active: w-8 h-[26px] text-[10.5px] font-medium text-zinc-300 bg-white/[0.06] text-center
header_dark.ghost_button: h-[26px] px-2.5 rounded-[5px] text-[10.5px] font-medium text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-300 border border-[#1e1e22] hover:border-[#2a2a2e] transition-colors

allocation_dark._note: V3: Individual progress bars per category, NOT a stacked bar. Plus secondary metrics (Rebalance, Risk Score) to fill dead space.
allocation_dark.title: text-[12px] font-medium text-zinc-400 mb-4
allocation_dark.secondary_label: text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.06em] text-zinc-700 mb-2

composition_rules._why: V3 learning: the relationship between components matters more than individual component styling. These rules encode the LAYOUT COMPOSITION that makes a dashboard look designed rather than assembled.

vertical_structure: 1. HERO KPI — full width, largest number on the page, with sparkline. Single card.
2. SECONDARY KPIs — 3 in a row (gap-3), compact cards with value+delta inline. mt-5 below hero.
3. CHART — full width, tall (240px), with docked footer stats. mt-5 below KPIs.
4. TABLE + ASIDE — grid-cols-[1fr_260px] gap-4. Table is primary, aside is fixed narrow. mt-5 below chart.
grid_rules: Hero KPI is ALWAYS full width. Never in a grid with other cards.
Secondary KPIs are ALWAYS 3 columns. Not 4 (too crowded), not 2 (too sparse).
Chart is ALWAYS full width. Side panels go in the table section below, not beside the chart.
Table + Aside uses grid-cols-[1fr_260px] — fixed aside width, table takes remaining space.
NEVER use equal column splits (50/50) for content + sidebar. Use 1fr + fixed px.
docking_rules: Supplementary stats (Avg Portfolio, Win Rate, etc.) are DOCKED as a footer row inside the chart card.
They are separated by a border-t and 1px vertical dividers (w-px h-3).
This eliminates 'orphaned component' syndrome — every metric belongs to a parent container.
The aside panel has secondary metrics (Rebalance %, Risk Score) below the allocation list to fill dead space.

hierarchy_rules: THREE tiers of visual importance, encoded via text size AND card elevation:
Tier 1 (Hero): text-[2.75rem], bg-[#101012], border-[#1a1a1e]. ONE value per page.
Tier 2 (Secondary): text-[20px], bg-[#0e0e10], border-[#16161a]. 3 values max.
Tier 3 (Inline): text-[11.5px], no card — or docked in chart footer / aside panel.
If all KPIs are the same size, NONE of them is important. The hero must be visually dominant.
table_hierarchy_rules: Tables have their own internal typographic hierarchy:
CLIENT / primary name column: font-medium text-zinc-300 — this is the star.
AMOUNT column: font-semibold + colored (green/red) — the actionable data.
REF / ID column: text-zinc-600 — dim, just for lookup.
TYPE column: text-zinc-600 — abbreviated (Wire not Wire Transfer).
STATUS: 5px colored dot + text-[10.5px] text — minimal not badges.
DATE: text-[10.5px] text-zinc-700 text-right whitespace-nowrap — nearly invisible.

aesthetic_profiles._why: Named profiles let the AI say 'use Mercury style' and get specific values.

mercury.vibe: near-black + green surgical accent + stark monochrome charts + zero decoration

linear.vibe: deep indigo-black + purple-blue accent + progress bars as primary visual + minimal icons

vercel.vibe: true black + blue accent + Geist typeface + pixel-perfect grid + zero warmth

stripe.vibe: warm white-blue + purple accent + generous whitespace + shadows over borders

notion.vibe: warm off-white + content-first + minimal chrome + warm grays (not blue-grays)

global_anti_patterns._critical: The 15 MOST COMMON AI design mistakes. Every pattern was identified from real AI-generated output across 3 critique iterations.

patterns.name: The Equal Grid
patterns.description: 4 stat cards in a row, all same size.
patterns.fix: Hero KPI gets full-width card. Secondary KPIs are 3 cols, compact. Never 4 identical cards.

patterns.name: The Orphaned Component
patterns.description: Standalone stat pills or metric rows floating between sections with no parent container.
patterns.fix: Dock supplementary stats inside the chart card as a footer row with border-t separator.

patterns.name: The Uniform Spacing
patterns.description: Every gap between sections is different (sometimes 16px, sometimes 24px, sometimes 32px).
patterns.fix: Lock ALL section gaps to mt-5 (20px). Use gap-3 for card grids. Consistency > variation.

patterns.name: The Flat Table
patterns.description: Every table column uses the same font size, weight, and color.
patterns.fix: Primary column: font-medium text-zinc-300. Amounts: font-semibold + colored. IDs/dates: text-zinc-600/700.

patterns.name: The Glass Card
patterns.fix: Solid bg-[#101012] border border-[#1a1a1e]. Three elevation tiers, not glass.

patterns.name: The Gradient Button
patterns.fix: Ghost button: h-[26px] px-2.5 border border-[#1e1e22] text-[10.5px] text-zinc-500.

patterns.name: The 16px Body
patterns.description: Using text-base (16px) anywhere in a dashboard.
patterns.fix: Table cells: 11.5px. Nav: 12.5px. Section heads: 12px. Hero value: 2.75rem. Nothing uses 16px.

patterns.name: The Centered Everything
patterns.description: justify-center and text-center on stat cards.
patterns.fix: Left-align everything. Right-align amounts and dates only.

patterns.name: The Icon Container
patterns.description: 40px colored circle with icon inside stat cards.
patterns.fix: No icons in stat cards. Sidebar icons: 14px with opacity-40 (inactive) / opacity-90 (active).

patterns.name: The Rainbow Status
patterns.fix: 5px dot (w-[5px] h-[5px] rounded-full) + text-[10.5px]. One color per semantic meaning.

patterns.name: The Default Font
patterns.description: font-sans with no tracking, no font-feature-settings, no tabular-nums.
patterns.fix: Root CSS: font-feature-settings 'cv02','cv03','cv11'. Hero: tracking-[-0.04em]. Table headers: tracking-[0.08em].

patterns.name: The Purple Default
patterns.fix: Match the domain. Finance: emerald. Projects: violet. Infra: blue.

patterns.name: The Wrapping Date
patterns.description: Date column too narrow, 'Mar 7' wraps to two lines.
patterns.fix: Date cells: whitespace-nowrap, fixed column width (w-[62px]), abbreviated format ('Mar 7' not 'March 7, 2026').

patterns.name: The Stacked Bar
patterns.description: Tiny stacked horizontal bar trying to show 5 allocation segments. Cash at 4% is invisible.
patterns.fix: Individual progress bars per category (h-[3px] each), OR remove the bar and just show the number.

patterns.name: The One-Surface Dark Mode
patterns.description: All cards use the same bg color. No depth perception.
patterns.fix: Three tiers: hero #101012, secondary #0e0e10, table headers #0c0c0e. Borders: #1a1a1e / #16161a / #131315.
